description: Set up build environment and verify existing project compiles cleanly before making changes
steps: Run `npm install` in /projects/sandbox/mind-map to install all dependencies
Run `npm run build` to verify the existing project compiles without errors
If build fails, diagnose and note the issue but do not fix unrelated problems
acceptance_criteria: `npm run build` completes successfully with exit code 0
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm it exits with code 0
findings: Build succeeds cleanly with Vite 6.4.2. 182 npm packages installed, 0 vulnerabilities. Output: 334.94 kB JS + 53.17 kB CSS.
